overall.summary: Overall score uses minimum dimension score 2 capped by highest severity CRITICAL.

proposal_semantics.proposal_summary: This proposal updates the MAI a/s/v token implementations on Optimism and Arbitrum to Aave 3.0.2, unpauses the MAI reserve, and sets it as flashloanable.

disclosed_entities.name: MAI
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: This proposal updates the `MAI` a/s/v token implementations on `Optimism` and `Arbitrum`

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Aligns the tokens with Aave 3.0.2 implementations.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: This proposal updates the `MAI` a/s/v token implementations on `Optimism` and `Arbitrum` to be aligned with `Aave 3.0.2`.

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Unpauses the MAI reserve allowing normal operations like liquidations to proceed.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal consists of standard administrative method calls to upgrade token implementations and change two configuration flags.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence:
The proposal executes the following commands:

- `POOL_CONFIGURATOR.updateAToken`
- `POOL_CONFIGURATOR.updateStableDebtToken`
- `POOL_CONFIGURATOR.updateVariableDebtToken`
- `POOL_CONFIGURATOR.setReservePause(AaveV3ArbitrumAssets.MAI_UNDERLYING, false)`
- `POOL_CONFIGURATOR.setReserveFlashLoaning(AaveV3ArbitrumAssets.MAI_UNDERLYING, true)`

disclosed_functions.textual_evidence: In `Aave v3.0.2` the signature of `handleRepayment()` has changed
but `liquidations` wouldn't work as they rely on `repay`

limitations: No hardcoded 0x addresses are provided in the proposal text, relying strictly on internal constants and configuration registries.

conflict_detection.summary: An undisclosed address participates in an uncovered critical business action.

findings.title: Unaccounted trace addresses
findings.description: One or more addresses appeared in the trace without direct proposal text disclosure.
findings.recommendation: Pause or escalate manual review because an uncovered critical business action is linked to an undisclosed address.

depth_analysis.summary: Observed trace depth exceeds claimed complexity.

findings.title: Trace complexity exceeds textual complexity disclosure
findings.description: Observed trace depth exceeds claimed complexity.
findings.recommendation: Review whether the proposal text should describe the actual call depth or indirect execution paths.

findings.recommendation: Compare proposal action wording with decoded functions and risk actions before relying on the text.
